title: Streaming Connection Manager
description: Create a robust connection manager for Serverpod streams that handles reconnection and error states.
instructions:
Build a StreamConnectionManager class that:

1. Manages the lifecycle of a Serverpod stream:
   - Connect to a streaming endpoint
   - Monitor connection health
   - Auto-reconnect on failure with exponential backoff
   - Track connection state (connecting, connected, disconnected, error)

2. Provide connection state to UI:
   - Expose connection status as a stream
   - Show appropriate UI based on state (loading spinner, connected indicator, retry button)

3. Handle cleanup:
   - Properly dispose streams when no longer needed
   - Cancel reconnect timers on dispose

Use this pattern for managing chat stream connections.

hints.text: Use a StreamController to broadcast connection state changes to listeners.
Implement exponential backoff: start with 1 second, double each retry up to a max (e.g., 30s).
Reset the backoff timer when connection is manually re-established (user action).
